playlists.smartCollectionsHint: Tap a template to create it instantly, or open custom rules if you want something more specific.
playlists.smartNameRequired: Enter a name for the smart collection.
playlists.smartRulesRequired: Add at least one rule so this smart collection knows what to match.
playlists.smartPreviewEmpty: This collection will start matching songs after you add a rule.
playlists.smartPreviewSentence: This collection will include songs that match {{rules}}.
playlists.smartNaturalPlayedPrefix: Include songs played in the last
playlists.smartNaturalAddedPrefix: Include songs added in the last

lyrics.dropLrcReadFailed: Could not read the LRC file
lyrics.pickEmpty: No candidates found. Try a different track or source.
lyrics.desktopLyricsAlwaysOnTop: Keep lyrics always on top of other windows
lyrics.desktopLyricsHint: Transparent floating lyrics (text with outline only, no bar). When enabled, opens on top and syncs. Drag the lyrics to move; right-click to close. Load lyrics for the track first.
lyrics.desktopLyricsChromeHint: Drag to move · Right-click or Esc to close
lyrics.desktopShowRomaji: Show romaji (same source as main lyrics)
lyrics.desktopWordHighlightHint: Plain or fake-timed lyrics cannot karaoke-fill; independent from main window word highlight.

nav.connectionsDesc: Account sign-ins, Discord, Last.fm, phone remote, and external devices

settings.languageHint: Pick a language for menus, settings, and system dialogs.
settings.fontCustomHint: Use built-in web fonts, system UI, or load .ttf / .otf / .woff / .woff2 from your computer.
settings.eqMasterDesc: Enable precise frequency control for high-fidelity output.
settings.gaplessDesc: Eliminate silence between tracks. Requires HiFi engine. Disables Automix.
settings.miniPlayerAlwaysOnTopDesc: When the bottom-bar mini player is opened, keep it above other windows by default.
settings.miniPlayerAutoHideMainWindowTitle: Hide main window with mini player
settings.miniPlayerAutoHideMainWindowDesc: When enabled, opening the mini player hides the main window and closing it shows the main window again.
settings.prevButtonModeDesc: Choose what the previous track button does.
settings.crossfadeDesc: Prewarms the next track near the ending and blends both tracks with an equal-power curve.
settings.crossfadeDurationDesc: Set the maximum overlap time. Short tracks are shortened automatically.
settings.outputBufferDesc: Applies to native playback through the main process. “Stable” uses a larger buffer to reduce dropouts with slightly higher latency; “Low latency” does the opposite.
settings.lyricsShadowDesc: When immersive background is on, control whether the lyrics panel keeps a frosted/shadow frame. You can disable it for full transparency.
settings.discordDesc: Display your current track and playback speed on your Discord profile.
settings.sleepTimerArmedTrack: Will stop after the current track ends.
settings.eqEngineHintHifi: HiFi engine: EQ and preamp are applied in the main process to PCM before output — what you hear matches these settings.
settings.eqEngineHintStandard: Standard engine: EQ uses the in-app Web Audio path. HiFi mode applies the same curve to native PCM instead.
settings.exclusiveDesc: Bypasses Windows audio mixer for bit-perfect output. Source sample rate is preserved (e.g. 192 kHz). Other apps will be muted while active.
settings.exclusiveWaiting: Exclusive mode will apply on the next track start.
settings.exclusiveStartupReset: Turn off exclusive mode on app startup
settings.exclusiveStartupResetDesc: Enabled by default. Turn this off if you want WASAPI exclusive mode to stay on after restarting ECHO.
settings.bufferHint: If you hear crackling or dropouts in exclusive mode, try increasing the buffer.
settings.dsdHint: DSD files are converted to high-resolution PCM for playback. DoP (DSD over PCM) for compatible DACs will be available in a future update.
settings.audioDrawerEqBlurb: Volume / device / exclusive / buffer affect the native output. Parametric EQ follows the settings page; on HiFi it is applied to PCM in the main process.
settings.downloadDirDesc: Highest quality media will be saved here.
settings.autoSaveLibraryDesc: Automatically save track list, likes, and custom playlists. If disabled, changes are session-only.
settings.closeButtonBehaviorDesc: Choose whether clicking the window close button quits the app or hides it to the system tray.
settings.plImportDesc: Files saved by the link importer go here. If unset, the default download folder above is used.
settings.aboutBody: ECHO is a high-performance Nightcore audio engine. All signal processing is done in 32-bit floating point precision via the Web Audio API for uncompromised quality.
settings.openSourceTrustNote: ECHO does not save any account information, contains no dangerous code, and the whole project is fully open source.
settings.releaseNotesHint: Recent fixes and changes are pulled from GitHub Releases.
settings.autoUpdateDesc: Check for and download available updates when ECHO starts.
settings.devConsoleDesc: Open or close the detached Chromium DevTools. Click again to close.
settings.devUnavailable: This action is only available in the desktop app.
settings.devUserDataFailed: Could not open user data folder: {{message}}
settings.devModeDesc: Reveal advanced developer tools when enabled; hide them when disabled.
settings.devModeDisabledHint: Developer features are currently hidden. Enable Developer mode to reveal them.
settings.devStartupDesc: Automatically open DevTools shortly after launch (next run).
settings.devReloadDesc: Reload the renderer (like a browser refresh).
settings.devCrashDirDesc: Open the folder where crash reports are saved.
settings.resetThemeDesc: Restore theme, colors, wallpaper, transparency, blur, radius, and other appearance options to defaults.
settings.resetAllDesc: Restore all visual settings, EQ bands, and themes to original defaults.
settings.networkDisableDesc: When enabled, ECHO will not connect to the network for updates, lyrics, covers, downloads, sign-in, or external pages.
settings.networkDisableConfirm: Disable all network access? Online lyrics, covers, downloads, updates, sign-in, and external links will stop working until you turn this off.
settings.resetThemeConfirm: Reset all theme/appearance settings to defaults? (Playlists, lyrics, downloader, etc. will not be affected.)
settings.resetConfirm: Reset all settings to original factory defaults? This will clear themes, EQ, and visuals.
settings.gradientModeDesc: Solid or linear blend (under accent glow).
settings.gradientEndDesc: Second color stop for the window backdrop.
settings.coverSizeDesc: Adjust the main player album cover size.
settings.autoLocateCurrentTrackDesc: When playback switches songs, automatically scroll the current list to the playing track.
settings.sidebarLogoDesc: Show the ECHO logo at the top of the left navigation. Turning it off lets the library list move up.
settings.bgImageDesc: Select a local image to use as your application backdrop.
settings.wallpaperOpacityDesc: Adjust the visibility of your custom background image.
settings.panelTransparencyDesc: Make UI panels more transparent or solid.
settings.blurStrengthDesc: Adjust the intensity of the frosted glass effect.
settings.libraryCleanupDesc: Scan the current library, playlists, likes, and playback history for missing files.
settings.uiFontDesc: Independent of the color preset (Outfit / Inter / System).
settings.cjkFontDesc: Used as the first fallback for Chinese text when the UI font has no CJK glyphs. You can also load a local font file.
settings.radiusScaleDesc: Global roundness for panels and controls.
settings.shadowStrengthDesc: Depth of drop shadows on glass panels.
settings.saturationDesc: Overall chroma boost for the whole window.
settings.lineHeightScaleDesc: Adjust text rhythm across settings, lists, and panels.
settings.controlDensityDesc: Tune spacing for rows, chips, and compact controls.
settings.themeDynamicCoverColorDesc: Use the current track cover as the theme color source.
settings.themeCoverAsBackgroundDesc: Use the current playing cover as the background image.

eqPlot.shelfQHint: On shelf filters, Q shapes the knee; very high values can sound inconsistent across engines.
eqPlot.gainExtremeHint: Large boosts past ±12 dB can cause audible distortion.

youtubeHint.body: YouTube MV didn't become ready in time (often a sign-in or verification page). Try Settings → Sign in to YouTube (in-app), then reload this MV.

addToPl.noPlaylistsHint: No playlists yet — use the form below or the Playlists tab.

downloader.folderRequired: Set a playlist import folder or default download folder in Settings before importing.
downloader.importNone: No tracks downloaded. Check network and region; try a proxy or set ECHOES_YTDLP_EXTRA for yt-dlp (e.g. --proxy).
downloader.placeholderUrl: Paste YouTube, Bilibili, or SoundCloud link here...
downloader.downloadComplete: Download complete! Successfully added to your playlist.
downloader.noDirHint: Please configure your save location first.
downloader.linkHintBefore: Paste a playlist or album link. What works depends on your connection and the source; some tracks may be skipped. You can set
downloader.linkHintAfter: for yt-dlp options (e.g. cookies or proxy) if needed.
downloader.neteaseCookiePlaceholder: Paste NetEase cookie (e.g. MUSIC_U), then sign in
downloader.neteaseOpenLoginFailed: Failed to open NetEase sign-in window
downloader.neteaseFeatureNeedRestart: Restart the Electron dev app, then try one-click sign-in again (main/preload not updated yet)
downloader.neteaseLoggedInVip: NetEase account signed in and VIP verified
downloader.neteaseCookieExpired: Saved NetEase cookie expired or is no longer usable. Please sign in again.
downloader.neteaseNotLoggedIn: Not signed in to NetEase (some tracks may be low quality or incomplete)
downloader.quickModeHint: Skip cover embedding and some extra metadata work for faster saves.
downloader.use1musicLabel: Download from 1music (direct link, faster & more stable)
downloader.directUrlFailed: Failed to get direct URL; sign in or track may be unavailable

metadataEditor.coverHint: Keep empty to preserve the current embedded artwork.
metadataEditor.saveHint: Changes are written back to the source audio file and reflected in the library immediately.

metadataQuick.coverHint: Hold Ctrl and click to change cover
metadataQuick.titleHint: Hold Ctrl and click to edit title
metadataQuick.artistHint: Hold Ctrl and click to edit artist

batchRename.hint: Only local files are renamed. Tags and library references are kept in sync automatically.

listenTogether.name: Your display name
listenTogether.roomLocked: Room is locked, valid key required
listenTogether.memberReadonlyHint: Host controls playback; members follow in read-only mode

lyricsDrawer.wordLeadMsHint: Positive values make highlight slightly earlier; negative values make it later.
lyricsDrawer.wordFillRatioHint: How early a line reaches 100% before the next line starts.
lyricsDrawer.backgroundHint: Applies when MV is not used as the lyrics background. Defaults to the theme; cover mode samples the current cover and falls back to the theme when no cover is available.
lyricsDrawer.fontColorHint: Overrides lyric text color in the lyrics view. Clear to use theme defaults.
lyricsDrawer.hideLyricsHint: Song info and side MV stay visible; only the lyric list is hidden.
lyricsDrawer.localPriorityHint: For local tracks, try this source before saved online/manual matches.
lyricsDrawer.sourceLocal: Local (.lrc next to file / embedded tags)
lyricsDrawer.sourceQq: QQ Music (falls back to Kugou / Kuwo)
lyricsDrawer.offsetHint: Positive values delay the highlight slightly vs. audio.
lyricsDrawer.dropzone: Drop or choose a local .lrc / .lrcx file
lyricsDrawer.linkPlaceholder: Paste song link (NetEase / QQ / Kugou / Kuwo)…
lyricsDrawer.linkHint: NetEase links support direct song-id lyrics fetch; other services use best-effort matching.

mvDrawer.searchHint: Search by the current song and artist or enter your own query, then choose from the MV candidates.
mvDrawer.searchEmpty: Enter a song name or search keywords first.
mvDrawer.searchUnavailable: MV search is not available in this build.
mvDrawer.searchNoResult: No MV result found for this query.
mvDrawer.searchNoCandidate: Bilibili search is busy. Try shorter keywords or paste an MV link.
mvDrawer.urlError: Unrecognized URL. Paste a YouTube or Bilibili video link.
mvDrawer.customHint: Paste a YouTube or Bilibili video URL to play as the current MV.
mvDrawer.hintBiliEmbed: Embed fallback — quality may be limited.
mvDrawer.autoSearchMvHint: When enabled, playing a song searches by song and artist, then lists MV candidates for manual selection.
mvDrawer.autoSearchResultsReady: MV candidates were updated for the current song.
mvDrawer.mvSyncOffsetHint: Adjust when the video lags or leads the music. Positive values seek the video slightly forward.
mvDrawer.hideImmersiveChromeHint: When immersive MV is on, hide the top song info and bottom playback bar for a clean view. Press Esc or tap the arrow (top-left) to leave lyrics.

castDrawer.introBefore: On the same Wi‑Fi as this computer, send music to
castDrawer.introAfter: . Local playback pauses when casting starts.
castDrawer.appsDlna: Apps and DLNA: ECHO is a standard UPnP AV (DLNA MediaRenderer). Any app that can cast to a TV/speaker over DLNA and sends a playable HTTP(S) stream can usually connect; device names and metadata vary by app. QQ Music and some others on Android/iOS support DLNA—check each app’s help. Spotify desktop normally uses Spotify Connect or system Bluetooth/speakers, not DLNA; if a build offers DLNA or a third-party bridge, try selecting this PC from the device list.
castDrawer.netease: NetEase Cloud Music: Enable “Connect DLNA devices” in settings; on the player screen open Devices / Cast and pick this device (same name as above). If it does not appear: confirm the LAN IP shown below is on the same subnet as your phone (wrong NIC or VPN is common); set env ECHOES_DLNA_IP to this PC’s Wi‑Fi IPv4 and check Windows Firewall for this app and UDP 1900. If playback fails, the URL may be encrypted—cast from inside the official app and keep it updated.
castDrawer.airplayIntro: AirPlay: Start this receiver, then choose ECHO AirPlay from iPhone, iPad, or Mac AirPlay audio output on the same Wi-Fi. Audio is routed through ECHO's selected output device.

remote.settingsDesc: Control playback, volume, lyrics, and EQ from a phone on the same Wi-Fi.
remote.heroDesc: Scan the QR code on the same Wi-Fi network.
remote.noUrl: Start the server to get a URL
remote.noTokenDesc: Only enable this on a trusted private LAN. Existing clients reconnect when this changes.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.empty: No plugins installed. Place plugin folders in the plugins directory or click Install.
plugins.confirmUninstall: Uninstall plugin "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
